title: Main Tera Dushman
subTitle: When a Forest Officer, Kishan Srivastav, hinders the criminal activities of Thakur Dayalu, he is framed for murder and sent to jail. Later, Kishan escapes prison and tries to clear his name.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Khudgarz
subTitle: Sita raises her son, Bihari, and his friend Amar as her own and the two treat each other like brothers. However, Amar's father is not too fond of Bihari, and he tries to create a rift between the two.

title: Fillers
subTitle: A comprehensive compilation of promotional videos and trailers of Bollywood movies featuring popular actors and actresses.

title: Police Officer
subTitle: Jai, a kind-hearted policeman gets killed during one of his encounters. His twin, who is an infamous conman, decides to track down Jai's murderer.

title: Gambler
subTitle: Though Inspector Dayashanker is lazy, he unwittingly unearths a criminal conspiracy and becomes the pride of his division overnight. However, a local gangsters turn his life into a nightmare.

title: Kishen Kanhaiya
subTitle: Separated at birth, Kishen and Kanhaiya grow up in different worlds, one in opulent luxury, the other in poverty. Fate reunites them as they fight together to end injustice.

title: Hogi Pyar Ki Jeet
subTitle: Two brothers attempt to fulfil their dying father's wish by marrying two daughters of an old enemy, intending to exact revenge.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
subTitle: Raj and Priya, a married couple, hire Madhubala, a prostitute, as the surrogate mother of their child. Trouble brews when Madhubala falls in love with Raj and insists on keeping the child.

title: Kundan
subTitle: Thakur Shamsher Singh, a wealthy criminal, tries to befriend a newly-appointed police officer in order to gain his favour, only to find out that the policeman is immune to his tactics.

title: Gadar: Ek Prem Katha
subTitle: A Sikh trucker and an aristocratic Muslim woman fall in love against the backdrop of the 1947 partition.

title: Vijaypath
subTitle: When a criminal is sentenced to death by Saxena, the gangster's brother, takes revenge by killing the judge's family and his driver. Later, the driver's son embarks on a vengeful quest.

title: Teleshopping
subTitle: Learn about a wide selection of products and take advantage of a convenient method of shopping. A show for those who love to shop from the comforts of their home.

title: Daanveer
subTitle: After the death of his parents, Vijay becomes a car driver to support his family. His hardships increase when his sister's marriage falls through.

title: Prithviraj Chauhan
subTitle: Prithviraj Chauhan, a great ruler, strives to overcome multiple challenges in order to defeat his enemies and ensure peace in his kingdom.

title: Akbar Birbal
subTitle: Clever Birbal aids Emperor Akbar in witty adventures, solving puzzles and delivering justice across Mughal India, unfolding tales of wisdom and humor.

title: Khiladi
subTitle: A group of four friends decide to play a prank involving the fake kidnapping of one of them and asking for ransom from her father. However, things become complicated when she actually ends up dead.

title: Pardesi
subTitle: An innocent villager is wrongly sentenced to death for a murder he didn't commit, but a twist of fate and a meeting with his lookalike lead to an unexpected chain of events.

title: Jung
subTitle: Desperate to save his son's life, Veer, an honest cop, is faced with an impossible choice when he discovers that the only person who can help him is a notorious criminal behind bars.

title: Mard
subTitle: Azad, a wealthy prosperous king, is locked in a dungeon by General Dyer who wants to take over his kingdom. Years later, Azad's son comes to his father's rescue and puts an end to Dyer's tyranny.

title: Raja Ki Aayegi Baraat
subTitle: A woman's desperate plea for justice falls on deaf ears as she's forced against her will to marry the man who assaulted her.

title: Andhaa Kanoon
subTitle: When his parents are killed by three men, Amar, Akbar and Anthony, Vijay teams up with a forest officer who was framed in a murder case to avenge their deaths.

title: Turtle
subTitle: Ramkaran tirelessly churns the dry earth of a village in Rajasthan for water. Meanwhile, the villagers participate in desperate measures to satisfy their thirst.

subTitle: When Vicky and Amar get switched at birth, one grows up to be a police officer and the other a murderer. Things take a turn when their parents learn the truth.

title: Rishtey - A Grand Celebration
subTitle: After falling in love with each other, a man and a woman must overcome obstacles and the generation-long rift between their families.

title: S 3
subTitle: A police officer is assigned to solve the murder of the police commissioner. However, when he stumbles across a criminal syndicate, he decides to put an end to their tyranny.

title: Aa Ab Laut Chalein
subTitle: After graduating from a university in India, an unemployed man decides to try his luck in New York and gets caught in a love triangle between an equally unlucky girl and a rich girl.

title: Aadmi
subTitle: Vijay, a factory supervisor, is falsely accused and arrested for killing his family. Just when he is at his lowest point, an inspector offers to help him in return for capturing the son of a gangster.

title: Koi ... Mil Gaya
subTitle: A young man with special needs is influenced by his father's scientific work. He encounters an alien who grants him extraordinary abilities and transforms his life.

title: Chor Machaaye Shor
subTitle: A thief pretends to be a policeman to extract a stolen diamond from the police headquarters. Although he becomes the ACP's favourite, a suspicious colleague tries to corner him with hilarious results.
